title: Minecraft, But When You Look At Blocks You Get Them
description: When you start this plugin, every time you look at a block you will get it.
body: When you start this plugin, every time you look at a block you will get it. To start it, use /blocklookget start. To stop it use /blocklookget stop. Enjoy the plugin and join my discord (https://discord.gg/dZEvtQ9Vhe) if you need help!
